title: albizia leucocalyx
intro: Albizia leucocalyx, also known as the East African white millettia, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the Fabaceae family of legume trees. The medicinal properties of Albizia leucocalyx include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are derived from its root bark, leaves, and seeds. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its use in traditional medicine to treat wounds and skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Albizia leucocalyx is often used to make tea, extracts, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
